Critique:
Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_row is intended to select specific rows relevant to the question—in this case, the last row (row 14) containing the final stadium listed. Using f_select_row(*) selects all rows and fails to isolate the last entry, misapplying the function’s purpose.
